title: Washer catalog — 9 kg · black preference · top-load full-auto · official manufacturers only

filtersApplied.color: black preferred; dark_silver body + black lid accepted as only official near-black 9 kg finish
filtersApplied.channel: official manufacturer storefronts only (no B.TECH / Amazon / Jumia)

marketFinding.summary: As of 2026-07-20, no official Egypt manufacturer lists a pure-black 9 kg top-load full-automatic washer. Elaraby (Sharp/Tornado) sells 9 kg top-load only in Dark Silver (body) + Black lid, or Silver. Fresh 9 kg top-load is Silver only (OOS). LG/Samsung/Beko/Zanussi/White Point 9 kg SKUs on official sites are front-load. LG/Fresh black top-loads start at 10 kg. Elaraby pure Black top-load starts at 11 kg.

manufacturersChecked.result: 4× 9 kg top-auto: 2 dark silver (black lid) + 2 silver — all OOS online. Pure black top-auto: 9 SKUs, all ≥11 kg. Hitachi 9 kg is front-load grey.
3× 9 kg top-load silver only, all OOS. No 9 kg black product page (404). Black top-load available at 7/10/11/12/15 kg.
9 kg models are front-load (incl. black WW90CGC0EDABAS). Top-load catalog is large-capacity (14–19 kg+).
No 9 kg top-load. Smallest black top-load: T10V1TEHG2 10 kg Middle Black ~15,990 EGP. 9 kg SKUs are front-load.
AW-J900DUPEG 9 kg top-load listed as Color Silver only (brochure site, no cart price).
Top-load Family Care at 8/10/12 kg (dark grey/silver/white). 9 kg models are front-load SteamMax/ProSteam.
Catalog is front-load full-auto (graphite/silver). No top-load 9 kg black listed.
Freestanding front-load only on EG site (incl. 9 kg WFST97XA). No top-load 9 kg black.
Site has top/front full-auto categories; no scrapeable 9 kg black top-load product cards in session.
No clear 9 kg black top-load e-commerce listing found.
No matching 9 kg black top-load product listing confirmed on EG site.

householdContext.note: 9 kg buffer for couple + bedding; black aesthetic preferred

disclaimer: Live scrape 2026-07-20 via Playwright on official manufacturer sites only. Pure black 9 kg top-load full-auto: zero listings. Included SKUs are the only official 9 kg top-load dark finishes (Dark Silver body + Black top cover). All currently Out of stock on Elaraby — use Notify me / call before buying. Prices change.

items.name: Sharp ES-TN09GDSP Top Automatic 9 kg — Dark Silver body / Black lid
items.colorDetail: Body Dark Silver · Top cover Black (official Elaraby specs)
items.stockNote: Out of stock on Elaraby Group — Notify me when in stock available on product page
pros: Exact 9 kg capacity — right size for a couple with bedding buffer
Top-load full automatic with drain pump (no floor drain gymnastics)
Black top cover + dark body is the darkest official 9 kg Sharp finish
Made in Egypt · 5-year full free warranty via Elaraby service network
Official manufacturer channel (Elaraby) — no third-party markup layer
Price ~13.5k EGP is mid-range vs inverter/front-load 9 kg options
cons: NOT pure black body — official color is Dark Silver (retailers sometimes call it black)
Out of stock on Elaraby right now — cannot buy online until restock
Non-inverter motor — louder spin and likely higher long-term energy use
700 RPM max spin — clothes come out wetter than front-load 1200–1400 RPM
No inverter / DDM in this 9 kg pump line (inverter Sharp tops jump to larger kg)
items.summary: Closest official Sharp 9 kg top-load to black (dark silver + black lid) · 13,529 EGP · OOS on Elaraby.

items.name: Tornado TWE-TLN09RDS Top Automatic 9 kg — Dark Silver body / Black lid
items.colorDetail: Body Dark Silver · Top cover Black (official Elaraby specs)
items.stockNote: Out of stock on Elaraby Group — Notify me when in stock available on product page
pros: Same 9 kg top-load full-auto form factor as Sharp twin — couple-sized correctly
Cheapest official near-black 9 kg option (~12.6k EGP vs Sharp ~13.5k)
Black top cover + dark silver body — darkest Tornado 9 kg finish on Elaraby
Drain pump + digital touch + 5-year warranty via Elaraby
Made in Egypt — local parts/service path under Elaraby Group
cons: Not pure black body (Dark Silver official); same near-black compromise as Sharp
Out of stock online on Elaraby
Non-inverter · 700 RPM — wetter spin-out, more noise than inverter tops
Tornado brand perception slightly below Sharp for some buyers (same Elaraby group)
Spec sheet nearly identical to Sharp ES-TN09GDSP — pay less, similar hardware class
items.summary: Best-price official near-black 9 kg top-load (Tornado dark silver + black lid) · 12,629 EGP · OOS.
